rows.label: qev060504_MSG0001
rows.name:
Man, those Zaruboggan sure possess
some incredibly cool power![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060504_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm thoroughly impressed! Even using
Ma-non machines, we couldn't have
cleaned this up so perfectly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060504_MSG0003
rows.name:
Damn it, at this rate the plant is
going to be completely ruined...
No... NLA itself is in danger![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060504_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Hey! Liza! Just go gather
anyone who can be of use! Nothing
can start without manpower![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060504_MSG0005
rows.name:
This is bad, at this rate... With it
broken so disastrously like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060504_MSG0006
rows.name:
Even for Ma-non engineers, repairs
will be impossible without a
decent amount of manpower...[ST:wait ]
